title: East Coast Cobblemon
description: Vanilla+ Cobblemon modpack featuring custom music
body:
# **East Coast Cobblemon**

Welcome to ECC! A casual, community-driven modpack that blends the charm of Pokemon with the creativity of Minecraft. This pack offers a chill, immersive experience perfect for trainers of all skill levels. 

### **🎶 Custom Soundtrack**
Alongside the base Vanilla+ modpack, you can enjoy a curated soundtrack pulled from across generations of Pokémon games, woven seamlessly into the world to bring your adventure to life. 

### **🏗️ Included Schematics**
Kickstart your world with free-to-use, ready-made builds:

🎈 Team Rocket Balloon – A fun homage to the classics.

🏥 Pokémon Center – Heal up in style.

🛒 PokéShop – Perfect for village hubs or towns.

🚉 Train Station – Connect regions or roleplay travel between cities via the create mod!


**_Notice: East Coast Cobblemon does NOT have an official server._**

## Technical Details

We recommend using shaders to bring the environment to life, we recommended Complementary Shaders due to it's highly customizable profiles. We also recommend around 6-8gb of RAM for better FPS and overall performance.
